title: VERA Safety Restriction Patterns
description: Dangerous command patterns that require validation or blocking

catastrophic.description: Commands that could destroy system, data, or VERA itself. Always block.

patterns.name: recursive_force_delete_root
patterns.description: Recursive deletion of root or home directory
patterns.message: ⚠️ BLOCKED: This command would recursively delete critical system directories.

patterns.name: disk_wipe
patterns.message: ⚠️ BLOCKED: This command would overwrite disk contents.

patterns.name: filesystem_format
patterns.message: ⚠️ BLOCKED: This command would format a filesystem, destroying data.

patterns.name: fork_bomb
patterns.message: ⚠️ BLOCKED: This is a fork bomb that would crash the system.

patterns.name: dev_null_redirect
patterns.description: Redirect output to raw disk device
patterns.message: ⚠️ BLOCKED: Writing directly to disk devices can corrupt data.

patterns.name: chmod_recursive_777
patterns.message: ⚠️ BLOCKED: This would make all system files world-writable (major security risk).

self_modification.description: Commands that modify VERA's own code or critical memory. Require explicit confirmation.

patterns.name: modify_run_vera
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: This would modify VERA's core script. Confirm? (yes/no)

patterns.name: delete_run_vera
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: This would delete VERA's core script. Confirm? (yes/no)

patterns.name: delete_vera_memory
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: This would delete VERA's operational memory. Confirm? (yes/no)

patterns.name: delete_my_diary
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: This would delete Claude's persistent memory. Confirm? (yes/no)

patterns.name: modify_safety_validator
patterns.message: ⚠️ BLOCKED: Cannot modify safety validator. This would compromise security.

destructive_operations.description: Potentially destructive commands that require validation.

patterns.name: bulk_file_deletion
move_to_dev_null
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Moving to /dev/null is equivalent to deletion. Confirm? (yes/no)

patterns.name: truncate_file
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: This will overwrite and truncate file contents. Confirm? (yes/no)

patterns.name: force_kill_processes
system_package_removal
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Removing critical system packages can break the system. Confirm? (yes/no)

environment_modification.description: Commands that modify Python environment or system configuration.

patterns.name: pip_uninstall_critical
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: This package is required by VERA. Confirm uninstall? (yes/no)

patterns.name: virtual_env_deletion
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: This will delete the Python virtual environment. Confirm? (yes/no)

patterns.name: env_file_deletion
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: This will delete environment configuration (may contain API keys). Confirm? (yes/no)

patterns.name: config_file_modification
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: This will overwrite shell configuration. Confirm? (yes/no)

chained_exploitation.description: Command chaining patterns that could bypass simple checks.

patterns.name: semicolon_chain
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Detected potentially dangerous chained command.

patterns.name: and_chain
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Detected potentially dangerous chained command.

patterns.name: pipe_to_shell
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Piping external input to shell is dangerous. Confirm? (yes/no)

patterns.name: command_substitution
patterns.message: ⚠️ INFO: Command uses substitution. Expanded command will be validated.

network_exposure.description: Commands that could expose system to network attacks.

patterns.name: disable_firewall
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: This will disable firewall protection. Confirm? (yes/no)

patterns.name: chmod_ssh_keys
patterns.message: ⚠️ BLOCKED: SSH private keys must not be world-readable (security risk).

patterns.name: expose_service_all_interfaces
patterns.description: Exposing service on all network interfaces
patterns.message: ⚠️ WARNING: This will expose a service on all network interfaces. Confirm? (yes/no)

protected_resources.description: Files and directories that have special protection rules

resources.message: ⚠️ WARNING: This is VERA's core script.
⚠️ WARNING: This is VERA's operational memory. Delete individual files only.
⚠️ WARNING: This is Claude's persistent memory. Delete individual files only.
⚠️ BLOCKED: Safety validator cannot be modified (security policy).
⚠️ BLOCKED: Danger patterns cannot be modified (security policy).
⚠️ WARNING: This contains environment configuration and may include API keys.

whitelist.description: Known safe commands that bypass validation (optimization)

validation_bypass.description: Commands that are explicitly allowed even if they match danger patterns

metadata.threat_model: Defense in depth: Block catastrophic, confirm destructive, log all
metadata.false_positive_strategy: User can override with explicit confirmation
metadata.audit_logging: All blocked/confirmed commands logged to activity_log.ndjson
metadata.escalation_policy: On ambiguous case, escalate to user rather than block
